summary: Crisp matrix recording from June 15 1992 with an excellent mix; reviewers give no specific performance commentary.
review: The single review highlights a very crisp, well‑balanced matrix source that matches the reviewer’s preferred mix. No details are provided about the musical performance, set flow, or individual players, so the assessment focuses on the recording quality alone.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one review, which is positive and praises the crisp matrix mix; lack of any show‑specific feedback limits confidence and lowers the overall rating despite strong recording quality.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Very crisp sound with a well‑balanced mix, as noted by the reviewer.
